ValidationRule.description: Requests is being deactivated, and we are not allowing new records. All issues go to OnIt or Jira
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( ISNEW() , ISCLONE()
, AND( $User.FirstName <> "Brad" , $User.FirstName <> "Mary" , $Profile.Name <>"DAS Operations" , $Profile.Name <>"System Administrator" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_REQUEST_003: Please create a JIRA IT Intake request for Salesforce platform issues (or OnIT for permissions/license requests). Requests is no longer getting new records or allowing edits as of June 30, 2020.
